full_text: I want to share something with you I learned over this weekend. Basically, you just screenshot the chart and upload it to the AI analyzer. Now, it's telling me, sell, take a profit, and my stock loss. Then I'm going to input everything you just gave me to the trade that it suggests, and I let it run. This is a great way to validate your trades. And if you want to learn more about day trading in general, this is a tool that highly recommend you write, oh, I just hit, wow, wow, okay, that's how easy it is. So I highly recommend this. Everyone I know loves it. If you want to learn more.
